text: Arpit Agarwala — Portfolio Overview ==================================== Name: Arpit Agarwala Location: Kolkata, India (Born in Rajasthan, raised in Assam) Education: BCom (Hons) at Bhawanipur Education Society College, 2023-2027 Professional Goal: Chartered Accountant (CA Intermediate candidate) CA Foundation: Cleared December 2023 Contact: - Email: arpitagarwalms@gmail.com - LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/arpitagarwala - GitHub: github.com/arpitagarwala - Instagram: arpit.agarwala_ - Website: arpitagarwala.online About: Arpit is a BCom (Hons) student and CA Intermediate aspirant who builds real-world tools at the intersection of finance and technology. He cleared the CA Foundation exam in December 2023 and is currently in deep preparation for CA Intermediate. Outside of studies, he builds web tools, analyses markets using SMC/ICT methodology, automates workflows in Excel, and trains 6 days a week. His edge is the ability to bridge analytical rigour with practical execution. Skills: - Financial Analysis (90%) - Excel & Automation (88%) - Web Design — Figma, HTML, CSS (82%) - Operations Management (80%) - Stock Market — SMC/ICT (75%) - Communication & Leadership (85%) - Accountancy, Front-End Dev, Market Analysis, Automation, Photo & Video Editing, Business Development, Leadership, Workshop Facilitation Experience: 1. Operations Management Intern at House of AC, Kolkata (May-Jul 2024) - Built automated invoicing system bridging HR and IT workflows - Designed master product sheet with auto-generated unique IDs - Integrated inventory system with purchase/sales automation 2. Business Development & Research Intern at Younity.in, Remote (May-Sep 2023) - Created marketing strategies for a 50,000+ learner platform - Generated ₹10k+ revenue in Month 1, surpassing 80% of teammates - Tenure extended 3 months for exceptional contribution 3.
